mapper.select: select count(thvl.id) from t_hos_visit_log thvl left join t_hos_visit thv on thvl.hos_visit_id=thv.id left join t_order o on thv.order_num=o.order_num left join t_hos_sick ths on thvl.sick_id=ths.id left join t_doctor_user tdu on thvl.doctor_user_id=tdu.id left join t_hospital th on tdu.hospital_id=th.id

if.test: startTime != null and startTime != '' and endTime != null and endTime != ''
